summary: Completed frontend testing for company name change from 'C&C Property Cleaning' to 'C&C Property Care'. All visible references updated successfully. Found and fixed one remaining reference in Gmail link subject line.
passed_tests: Landing page loads without runtime errors
Header brand displays 'C&C Property Care' correctly
Footer displays '© 2026 C&C Property Care. Serving Long Island, New York.'
Old company name 'C&C Property Cleaning' not visible anywhere on page
Services section references correct company name
Call CTA button functional with correct aria-label
Email button aria-label shows 'C&C Property Care'
Gmail link subject line updated to 'C&C Property Care Consultation' (fixed during testing)
Book Consultation button visible and functional
